taskName: Scope change implementation - remove remote admin page from FileEasy v1
goal: Implement FE-CR001 by removing the remote /admin management page and remote file-management surface from FileEasy v1 while preserving the remote upload page.
nonGoals: Do not redesign the upload page.
Do not add a replacement remote management UI.
Do not implement local APK file manager in this task.
Do not remove upload chunk/resume APIs.
Do not reintroduce player, monitor, discovery, or public access behavior.

acceptanceChecks.text: In FileEasy mode, APK homepage no longer shows or opens a remote admin page entry, while upload URL/QR and password-local controls remain available.
Remote /admin no longer renders FileEasy file-management UI and cannot be used to browse, preview, rename, delete, batch delete, or download uploaded files.
Remote upload page / still loads and can authenticate and upload through the approved upload APIs.
FileEasy mode exposes only upload-surface APIs remotely; remote /api/v1/files* and /uploads/* management/download surfaces are disabled, removed, or return a non-success response.
No player UI, monitor dashboard entry, autodiscovery, public access, or unrelated feature expansion is introduced.

handoffQuestions: Confirm whether /admin returns 404, 410, or redirects to /, and why that behavior was chosen.
List any remaining admin code that is intentionally left only as dead code or future-scope code.
Confirm upload page / and upload APIs still work after admin removal.
